text:
Created attachment 187455
Update cacti ti 1.1.27

Update cacti to 1.1.27

Committer: please ignore portlint warnings regarding gettext as cacti has built-in gettext support.

This is just a bugfix release, no merge-quarterly is required.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.3/11.1 amd64/i386 are located at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.1.27/
